repo_prior_art.cite: pid_dose_response_shape_v1: finite-grid shape-closed continuous-treatment sensitivity LP without IV, copula tube, or rank-slice slope target

published_prior_art.cite: FirpoRidder2019: Makarov pointwise bounds are not uniformly sharp for treatment-effect-distribution functionals; FanPark2010: sharp Makarov-type distributional bounds

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_dose_response_shape_v1: finite-grid CMSM/shape pasting; no continuous IV and no adjacent-dose rank-copula law

published_prior_art.cite: BaitairianSebastienJreichKatsahianGuilloux2025 and DalalTchetgenTchetgen2025 give dosewise continuous-treatment sensitivity bounds, not one-law continuous-IV plus copula pasting sharpness

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_dynamic_iv_compliance_v2: IV partial-ID memory bounds for finite binary compliance, not continuous-dose rank-slice copula sign certification

published_prior_art.cite: Chesher2003/Jun2009 identify local structural derivative or quantile effects; Kline2016 identifies IV causal-effect direction, but none gives bounded-confounding copula-tube slope lower endpoints
standard linearity-of-expectation marginal collapse; FirpoRidder2019 notes the average is the only point-identified treatment-effect-distribution functional from marginals

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The Kasy2014 comparison repeats the original unrestricted-heterogeneity identification claim without noting the 2017 corrigendum: the broad point-identification assertion fails absent an extra one-dimensional first-stage heterogeneity condition.

soundness_flags.label: Locked parameters / Assumption 3
soundness_flags.one_line: The local reference law R_j(dy|z,x)=Law(Y|A=a_j,Z=z,X=x) is version-dependent for continuous A unless the proposal locks a density/local-limit/kernel version and support condition, not just 'relevance sufficient to define' it.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Patch the Kasy comparison by citing the corrigendum and positioning Kasy as a continuous-IV marginal-information benchmark only under its repaired support/one-dimensional heterogeneity conditions.
Replace exact-dose conditionals R_j with a locked local-limit or density-ratio definition, including positivity/support assumptions for neighborhoods of a_j and z.
Add a minimal two- or three-rank-bin numeric witness for Conjecture 2 showing positive rho<1/2 lower endpoint, nonpositive rho=1 endpoint, and full-population interval containing zero.

recommended_next_step: Revise the Kasy prior-art paragraph and the exact-dose conditional-law definition, then rerun Stage -0.5 before Stage 0.
